_comment: River Bankers material-deck card data. 24 base cards = 6 materials × 4 icon-count tiers (4/5/7/8), plus Bramble Shoal (the 2P-only shared stones/vines wild-5 that replaces Rocky Shoal + Trailing Vine at 2 players) = 25 cards. 9 of 25 are effect-bearing. Names mirror MATERIALS.md. Effect prose mirrors web/index.html effectDescription() verbatim.

cards.name: Driftwood Tangle
cards.effect_text: Wild: each claimed icon yields Logs OR Reeds (chosen at build time).

cards.name: Old Growth
cards.effect_text: If this card is at River 3 or 4, each worker you retrieve yields 2 Logs instead of 1.

cards.name: Bramble Shoal
cards.effect_text: Wild: each claimed icon yields Stones OR Vines (chosen at build time).

cards.name: Hidden Inlet
cards.effect_text: If exactly one player has workers on this card when it reaches shoreline, that player moves back 1 space on the fish track per worker.

cards.name: Cattail Cluster
cards.effect_text: When this card reaches shoreline, the player with the most workers moves back 3 spaces on the fish track. Ties: nobody.

cards.name: Mud Wallow
cards.effect_text: When this card reaches shoreline, the player with the most workers moves back 2 spaces on the fish track. Ties: nobody.

cards.name: Vine Curtain
cards.effect_text: When you build using workers from this card, peek at the top 2 material cards and rearrange them.

cards.name: Mud Slick
cards.effect_text: Wild: each claimed icon yields Mud OR Clay (chosen at build time).

cards.name: Slipping Sandbar
cards.effect_text: Enters the river at River 4. After an auction on this card with workers placed, slides one slot upstream instead of downstream. At River 1, retires to shoreline instead.
